text.title: Motion and Micro-Interaction System Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Motion and Micro-Interaction System output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: duration_tokens populated with a typed value
easing_tokens populated with a typed value
reduced_motion_policy populated with a typed value
perceived_perf_anchors populated with a typed value
choreography_rules populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
